---
title: "Practical 3 Tools"
author: "Author Name"
date: "2026-05-03"
output:
  html_document:
    keep_md: true
---

## Introduction

This is the R Markdown document for Practical 3 Tools.

## Code Examples

```{r}
# Example R code here
summary(cars)
```

## Conclusion

In this document, we discussed the tools used in Practical 3.
